title: BackShip - How much does the service cost?
bodyHtml:
Back Market has negotiated exclusive prices with different shipping providers, and we’re always renegotiating to provide our sellers with the best prices. Below you’ll find the European shipping rates with our current providers: DHL Express, Chronopost, Colissimo, DPD, UPS, and Correos Express.

In order for you to read the rate cards properly, remember that: 

  • Rates don’t include VAT
  • Rates vary depending on the package pickup location, destination, and weight (please search for your country grid and look at the rates for each destination)
  • Pickup varies per shipping provider, but most of the time it’s included in the price 


See the table below for available pickups:

  • Rates don’t include fuel surcharges, and they vary depending on the package pickup, destination, and shipping provider


Back Market is charged at the end of each month. We’ll look at the difference between sellers’ and shipping providers' bills, so we can charge the correct amount to sellers. For more information about this, please read this section.

Please note that most of the shipping providers calculate the package weight and take its volumetric weight into account, so there are no discrepancies between the actual weight and estimated one.

For heavy or bulky items of more than 30 kg, our current shipping providers aren’t yet able to handle these items properly. We’re working on a future solution for these items. To be safe, check out the items considered heavy or bulky

If you have any questions, please contact the Seller Support Center (SSC) here.
